graphName.description: The name of the graph (1-63 alphanumeric characters or hyphens).

provisionedMemory.description: The provisioned memory size in Neptune Capacity Units (NCUs).

tags.description: Tags to assign to the graph.

publicConnectivity.description: Whether the graph can be reached over the internet.

kmsKeyIdentifier.description: KMS key identifier for encryption at rest.

vectorSearchConfiguration.description: Vector search configuration for the graph.

dimension.description: The number of dimensions for vector embeddings.
